Bus Timings

30 Bus Timings Dubai Mall MS to Dubai Sky Courts and Return

July 9, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus route 30 provides a convenient and reliable transportation option for residents, commuters, and tourists traveling between Dubai Mall and Dubai Sky Courts. This route connects key residential, commercial, and educational landmarks, offering a smooth and efficient journey through Dubai. With frequent services throughout the day, Bus 30 ensures a hassle-free commute for everyone looking to travel between these two prominent destinations.

Operational Details

Bus 30 operates daily, providing services from early morning to late evening to accommodate various travel schedules.

From Dubai Mall MS From Dubai Sky Courts
07:00 07:58
07:25 08:23
07:55 08:53
08:25 09:23
08:34 09:53
08:55 10:23
08:59 10:53

Bus 30 Timetable

Passengers are encouraged to check the latest schedules through the official RTA website to stay updated on exact 30 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: The fare for Route 30 follows Dubai’s standard RTA pricing. Passengers need to have a minimum balance of AED 7.50 on their Nol card before boarding to ensure a smooth travel experience and avoid fines. Nol cards can be easily topped up at various locations throughout the city.

Route Overview

Bus 30 begins its journey at Dubai Mall Metro Station and ends at Dubai Sky Courts, making several essential stops along the way. These include residential neighborhoods, educational institutions, and commercial hubs, providing easy access to passengers at various points along the route. Below are some of the key stops:

  1. Dubai Mall Metro Landside The starting point, offering easy connections to Dubai Metro and other public transport services.

  2. ENBD HQ A stop near the headquarters of Emirates NBD.

  3. Liwan Entrance, Liwan Mazaya 18, 20, 24 These stops serve the Liwan residential communities, providing access to various apartment complexes.

  4. Liwan Mazaya 11, Geepas, R20, 6, 4, 10A Additional stops in the Liwan area for various residential buildings.

5.

  1. GEMS First Point School, The Aquila School, Al Sondos Orchid, Al Sondos Sage Convenient stops for students, staff, and visitors to these educational institutions.

  2. Dubai Sky Courts The final destination, located near major residential complexes.

  3. International Center For Biosaline Agriculture & EPPCO Muntazah Petrol Station Stops serving the agricultural research center and a key fuel station.

  4. Avenue Mall & ENBD HQ Returning towards central Dubai, these stops provide access to shopping and commercial areas.

The route then loops back to Dubai Mall Metro Landside, completing the journey. This comprehensive route offers convenient transportation for both residents and visitors across various districts.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Accessibility Features

The buses on this route are equipped with low floors for easier boarding, designated seating areas for people with disabilities, and audiovisual aids for those with hearing or vision impairments. This ensures an inclusive and comfortable journey for all travelers.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

Starting at Dubai Mall Metro Landside, passengers can easily transfer to the Dubai Metro, as well as other bus routes. This provides seamless travel to various parts of the city. At its final stop, Dubai Sky Courts, passengers can connect to local services or private transport options, ensuring smooth onward travel.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

These include:

  • Dubai Mall

  • Liwan Residences
  • Dubai Sky Courts

Journey Experience

A traveler recently took Bus 30 from Dubai Mall Metro Station to Dubai Sky Courts and back, experiencing a long yet scenic journey through Dubai’s vibrant cityscape.

Along the way, the traveler noted the proximity to Global Village, a multicultural theme park, adding an interesting aspect to the trip. Upon reaching Dubai Sky Courts, a quieter residential area, the contrast between the serene surroundings and the bustling city center became apparent.

Tips and Travel Advice

For a smooth and efficient journey, passengers are encouraged to:

  • Ensure your Nol card is sufficiently loaded before boarding the bus to avoid delays.
  • Use the RTA app for real-time updates and any route changes, ensuring a seamless travel experience.

Bus route 30 plays a crucial role in Dubai’s urban transport system, linking both residents and tourists to essential destinations across the city. Whether you’re commuting to work, attending school, or exploring the city’s attractions, this route provides a convenient, reliable, and affordable travel option.

For the full Dubai bus route details, as well as the latest schedules and ticket prices, travelers are encouraged to visit the RTA website or use the RTA app. With its extensive connectivity and inclusive services, Bus 30 ensures that every journey in Dubai is smooth and comfortable.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 9, 2025.
